# gigahost_dns_redirect (Resource)

Manages an HTTP redirect for a Gigahost DNS zone.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gigahost_dns_zone" "example" {
  zone_name = "example.com"
}

resource "gigahost_dns_redirect" "example" {
  zone_id    = gigahost_dns_zone.example.zone_id
  source     = "www"
  target_url = "https://example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `target_url` (String) URL that requests are redirected to.
- `zone_id` (String) Id of the DNS zone that contains the redirect.

### Optional

- `source` (String) Subdomain the redirect applies to; defaults to "@" (the zone root).

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the redirect is active.
